svg.text: NAVY ERP / SAP-BASED FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT ARCHITECTURE BLUEPRINT
Version 2 — audit/UoT view | Current-state SAP ECC/HANA cloud model with future S/4HANA / EBS-C modernization considerations
Label as source/peer/interface systems: not every
system is a simple feeder and not every
transaction posts directly to Navy ERP.
Vendor/customer master, material master, cost centers, WBS/project structures, funds/fund centers,
document flow, line-item drilldown, interface acknowledgements and rejections.
Static blueprint note: capabilities are generalized for Navy ERP; exact module names, configuration, custom
objects and roles vary by release, command and implemented process.
These objects explain the who, what, when, why and
support that the GL summary normally does not
USSGL, fund, org, program, object class,
Statement of Changes in Net Position
Statements are produced from USSGL/SFIS attributes
and validated trial-balance reporting, not by
7. DATA LINEAGE, AUDIT ANALYTICS & UoT CONTROL MODEL
what an AI/UoT engine should test end-to-end
PR/PO, invoice, asset, order, cost posting
Completeness | traceability | accuracy | timeliness | supportability | data quality | controls | segregation of duties
8. REPRESENTATIVE SAP ECC TABLE GROUPS / TECHNICAL APPENDIX
not an official Navy ERP data dictionary — separate tables, fields and T-codes
Tables: BKPF, BSEG, FAGLFLEXA/T, SKA1, SKB1, T001
Purpose: accounting document header, line items, chart/accounts, company
Tables: FMIFIIT, FMIOI, FMFCTR, FMBH/FMBL, FMDERIVE config examples
Purpose: budgetary execution, funds centers, budget documents
Tables: EBAN, EKKO, EKPO, EKBE, MKPF/MSEG, RBKP/RSEG
Purpose: PR, PO, goods movement, invoice document flow
Purpose: vendor/customer master and open/cleared items
Purpose: asset master, depreciation areas, asset transactions
Tables: CSKS/CSKT, COBK, COEP, AUFK, PRPS/PROJ
Purpose: cost centers, actual cost postings, internal orders, WBS/project
Tables: MARA, MARC, MARD, MBEW, MSEG
Purpose: material master, plant/storage stock, valuation and movement details
Tables: EDIDC, EDID4, EDIDS, USR02, AGR_*
T-codes often used for review: WE02, WE09, BD87; these are not tables
Navy ERP is shown using public information and generalized SAP architecture; exact configuration is controlled by DON/Navy ERP program
Source systems may be feeders, peer ERPs, operational systems of record, or interfaces depending on the transaction and command.
Table names are representative SAP ECC examples, not a certified Navy ERP extract or full data dictionary.
PP&E / military equipment treatment can vary by asset class and implemented process.
Source/peer systems → ERP capabilities → detailed transaction objects → budgetary &
proprietary USSGL → reporting layer → financial statements → UoT exceptions.
universal journal / simplified data model where applicable
data enablement, audit analytics and AI control monitoring
reduced custom interfaces and stronger lineage
Generated as a static SVG blueprint; edit source in create_blueprint.py / blueprint-data.json
